title: [codereview-P1 pass2] ccp16_vectors hash_32 and test update: struct import minimal, computation in literal works for generator JSON, pytest passes. Minor: eui64 string parsed? Not yet but vector uses int(1). No correctness issues. P4 opinion: move hash_32 to shared test util.
description: Pass 2 focused on test integrity and minimal change. Confirms expected values now derived from oracle not placeholders. Schema and regeneration clean. No P0-P2.
